## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SentinelOne's CVE vulnerability database launch and content production progress.](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CVE database: Staging in temp ContentStack account; aiming for 500 initial entries with phased rollout](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Release plan: Aida to create by week's end; tentative Oct 15 launch (pending dev confirmation)](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Content pipeline: 6 articles to be delivered this week; new assignments being developed](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Looker dashboard: Being updated with blog traffic; temporary glitch being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

## Topics

### CVE Database Development Progress

  - [Marcus updating Atlas workflow to generate individual CVE pages for ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Demo account integration complete; ready to start publishing to ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Plan to publish test batch (15-20 entries) before full 500-entry launch](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Ankit shared publishing strategy: focus on recent CVEs (2020+) with 200+ monthly search volume](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Phased rollout: 50 entries at launch, gradually increasing to 500 over \~10 days](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Release Plan and Timeline

  - [Aida to create release plan by end of week, using Cybersecurity 101 launch as template](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Tentative launch date: October 15th (pending developer confirmation)](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Marcus to create working prototype by tomorrow to assess timeline feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Nicolas raised need for GitHub access to integrate with SentinelOne's codebase](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Content Generation Pipeline

  - [Uses CVE number as input, fetches data from NVD and other sources](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Searches for GitHub exploits and confirms if active](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Generates detailed markdown article with threat analysis](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Capability to process multiple CVEs in parallel](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Plan to implement watcher for new CVE releases](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [5 articles in production this week, 1 article being revised](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [6 total editorial pieces to be delivered by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Katya developing additional assignments to maintain content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [4 articles reviewed by PMM team; some require minor changes](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [4 articles (including behavioral detection attack and NIST attack) to be published this week](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)

### Traffic Monitoring

  - [Looker dashboard being updated with blog traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [First published blog received over 50 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Temporary glitch preventing URL display in Looker, being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcus to complete working prototype of CVE database integration](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Aida to create and share CVE database release plan by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Nicolas to follow up on GitHub access with web team in upcoming call](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Katya to review PMM feedback and incorporate into content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Team to resolve Looker dashboard glitch for accurate traffic reporting](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Ankit to use provided documents for internal communications on project progress](https://fathom.video/share/sSxL4YvqHD5uXzJp2VhyHXyt8QfsBiQM?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
